publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-07-30 18:41:36 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, records, memorabilia, video cassettes, and photographs.
did.abstract: Includes letters to family, certificates and medals, maps, Army records, insignia, receipts, and memorabilia of a helicopter pilot in the Vietnam War.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes letters to family, certificates and medals, maps, Army records, insignia, receipts, and memorabilia of a helicopter pilot in the Vietnam War. Also, videocassette of movies taken in Vietnam and tape recordings sent home during the war; includes family papers and business records, and photographs.

odd.head: NOTES
odd.p: Part of Vietnam War Veterans Archives.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: John V. Breedlove Papers, #7036. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Boxes 6, 7, 8, 9, and 12 restricted for 50 years except by written permission of the donor.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted

did.unittitle: Columbus, Georgia orders, promotion, processing material
Letters to and from family and friends, photographs
Letters to M. and Mrs. E. Borey

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: including draft cards, 1969 Vietnamese calendar, stencil

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: including matches from Seattle (departure location); flight school pen; Dog tags (enlisted man and officer); Chinook going away pin (in box); DAV card, and sticker

did.unittitle: National Defense service ribbon and Army Commendation Medal

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Including ROTC (Siena College) insignia; Warrant Officer candidate insignia; Warrant Officer WO1 Bar, pin; CW2 Warrant Officer bar (pin and camouflage); US insignias; Vietnamese insignias; Chuan Huy Warrant Officer pin; Air Force Association pin; Chinook pilot pin.

did.unittitle: U.S. Army Primary Helicopter School 2nd WOX Class 67-5 Fort Wolters, Texas
2nd Training Brigade, Fort Polk, Louisiana, U.S. Army Training Center Infantry Company B Third Battalion

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Including: flight school, 3rd Army, and first aviation brigade patches; Unite patches (company level) 119th out of Pleiku; Chinook Unit patches (God is our co-pilot); Name patches, pins (U.S. Army, etc.); Flight School insignia (in orang and black); and army pilot wings. Ring from Fort Wolters, TX; start of flight school ring.

did.unittitle: Maps, flight school bag, flight school company photograph, and tape.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted for 50 years except by written permission of the donor. Identity of individuals mentioned in papers must be restricted for 25 years.

did.unittitle: Two maps: DOD evasion charts and Southeast Asia
